name: My Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the steak in flour, then season with salt and pepper if desired.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Brown the onions, garlic, and meat until the meat is browned on all sides.
4. Pour ketchup over the meat and stir to combine.
5. Cover the pan and cook for at least 1 hour, or until the steak is tender.
6. Check occasionally to ensure the meat does not burn. If it looks like it may burn, add water or broth if available.
This rewritten recipe maintains the original title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency in the presentation.
